AI assistance

Ask the ContractorsCalc AI Bot

Use the chat assistant to get help planning material, labour, and construction estimates.

Ask about cement, concrete, bricks, paint, tiles, labour, HVAC, roofing, flooring, asphalt, drywall, or deck.
Tip: This AI chat works with the backend API on Vercel or local Node.
